title: About the author
html:
About the author

Hello!!

Credits for techniques from other researchers belong to the original authors (see references). Kudos to everyone who shares knowledge to improve internet security.

HackTricks is an educational wiki about cyber-security led by Carlos with hundreds of collaborators. It's a huge collection of hacking tricks updated by the community as much as possible. If you find something missing or outdated, please send a Pull Request to the Hacktricks GitHub!

HackTricks is also a wiki where researchers share their latest findings, so it's a great place to keep up to date with the latest hacking techniques.
